raw_vignette:
Age: 72
ECOG: 1
Primary diagnosis:
Common B-ALL, ID 11/2021
At initial diagnosis:
Peripheral blood: Hb 7,2 g/dl, Plt 28/nl, WBC 3,5/nl, 12% blasts
Bone marrow:
Cytology: 88% blasts
Flow cytometry:
CD45 low, SSC low, CD34+, CD19+, CD20+/-, CD22+, CD10+, TdT+, CD33-, CD38+
FISH: unremarkable findings, no ALL-typical translocations
Histology: Interstitial and nodular infiltration, MF-0/1
Molecular genetics: BCR::ABL1 negative
Secondary diagnoses:
Breast carcinoma, right, ID 03/2023
- Stage: pT1c, pN0 (0/2 sn), L0, G2, R0, cM0
- Hormone receptor status: ER 80%, PR 60%, Ki67: 15%, HER2: negative
Treatment and course:
Question for the tumor board:
Treatment indication?
Tumor board decision:
With rising MRD positivity initially Treatment initiation with Blinatumomab. CAR-T /
Allo-SCT to be considered.
================================================================================
TREATMENT TIMELINE
================================================================================
12.04.2020 Start Pre-phase (Dexamethason + Cyclophosphamid); Induction I based on
GMALL-elderly.
15.04.2020 CT H/T/A: presacral soft tissue formation without bone destruction (a.e.
extramedullary hematopoiesis; DD neurogenic tumor/Chordom less likely). Prominent
glandular tissue left breast (if applicable, gynecological correlation). Small cystic
lesion pancreatic head ~0,5 cm (a.e. side branch dilatation).
18.04.2020 Lumbar puncture: 1 cell/µl; Flow cytometry without blast population.
26.04.2020 Lumbar puncture: 1 cell/µl; Flow cytometry without blast population.
10.05.2020 BM: Cytology ~1% blasts; FACS: no evidence of pathologic blast population
(ED-LAIP not detectable).
12.05.2020 CT H/T/A: stable findings ggü. 15.04.2020; presacral formation continued
a.e. extramedullary hematopoiesis.
14.05.2020 Induction II (Day 21-32 after GMALL-elderly).
16.05.2020 Lumbar puncture: 1 cell/µl; Flow cytometry without blast population.
24.05.2020 Lumbar puncture: 1 cell/µl; Flow cytometry without blast population.
30.05.2020 Lumbar puncture: 1 cell/µl; Flow cytometry without blast population.
14.06.2020 Remission assessment (Day 62): BM <5% blasts; Flow cytometry/Kiel: MRD
negative.
21.06.2020 Consolidation I Part 1: MTX 500 mg/m2 + PEG-Asparaginase 500 U/m2.
07.07.2020 Consolidation I Part 2: MTX 500 mg/m2; without PEG-Asparaginase
(transaminase elevation + transfusion-requiring coagulopathy).
18.07.2020 Remission assessment: complete remission; MRD Kiel negative.
30.07.2020 Consolidation II: HD-AraC 500 mg/m2.
31.08.2020 Re-induction therapy (GMALL-elderly; Start).
06.10.2020 Remission assessment before Consolidation III: BM <5% blasts; FACS without
pathologic blast population; MRD negative. CT H/T/A: presacral stable, slight size
increase para-aortic.
08.10.2020 Consolidation III Part 1 (week 24).

03.11.2020 Consolidation III Part 2 (d16): MTX 500 mg/m2 + PEG-Asparaginase 500 U/m2.
01.12.2020 Consolidation IV: Cytarabin 500 mg/m2 on Day 2/4/6.
21.12.2020 Remission assessment before Consolidation V: no blast increase; FACS/Kiel:
MRD negative.
28.12.2020 Consolidation V Part 1: intrathecal triple therapy + MTX 500 mg/m2 +
PEG-Asparaginase 500 U/m2. LP: 1 cell/µl; FACS without blasts.
11.01.2021 Consolidation V Part 2: MTX 500 mg/m2 + PEG-Asparaginase 500 U/m2.
02.02.2021 Start Maintenance: MTX 30 mg weekly (Mi) + Folsan 5 mg (Do) + 6-MP (100/50
mg alternating).
24.02.2021 Stop Maintenance: thrombocytopenia Grade IV, leukopenia Grade II, anemia
Grade II.
12.03.2021 Imaging/Orthopedics: older BWK2-, BWK11- and BWK12-fractures; right SI
joint dysfunction.
18.05.2021 Zoledronsäure 4 mg i.v. with Osteoporosis.
10.06.2021 Hematologic Relapse.
17.06.2021 Relapse confirmed: BM ~51% blasts, CD22 positive.
25.07.2021 Start Inotuzumab-Ozogamicin (Cycle 2; administration on d1/d8/d15).
22.08.2021 Start Inotuzumab-Ozogamicin (Cycle 3; administration on d1/d8/d15).
12.2021 Again MRD-positive.
05.01.2022 Enrollment in CAR-T-study (HD-CAR-1). With high blast burden Bridging:
GMALL-elderly Pre-phase, subsequently Blinatumomab.
10.01.2022 Leukapheresis for CAR-T cell production.
11.01.2022 BM: ~52% blasts; MRD positive.
17.01.2022 Start Pre-phase after GMALL-elderly.
20.01.2022 Lumbar puncture (Pre-phase): FACS without Detection of a blast population.
24.01.2022 Blinatumomab Cycle 1, Day 1.
28.04.2022 Clinical screening/pre-infusion: Clearance for CAR-T-study.
06.05.2022 CAR-T cell infusion.
03.06.2022 Day +28: CR, MRD negative (PB/BM).
06.08.2022 Day +92: CR, MRD negative (PB/BM).
13.10.2022 Day +160: CR, MRD negative (PB).
05.11.2022 Day +183: CR, MRD negative (PB).
10.12.2022 Day +218: CR, MRD negative (PB).
12.01.2023 Day +251: CR, MRD negative (PB).
09.02.2023 Day +279: CR, MRD negative (PB).
18.03.2023
04.2023 Invasive breast carcinoma NST, left (ID 04/2023). Pre-treatment: cT2 cN0 cM0;
ER ~80%, PR ~70%, Ki-67 ~30%, HER2 positive, G2. Postoperative: ypT1c ypN0 (1sn) L0 V0
Pn0 G2 R0.
05.2023 CT Thorax/Abdomen + scintigraphy: no metastasis.
11.06.2023 Neoadjuvant Trastuzumab/Pertuzumab started.
15.06.2023
24.06.2023 Neoadjuvant Tamoxifen.
16.08.2023 Surgery: BET + SLNB left.
29.08.2023 Tumorboard: T-DM1 post-neoadjuvant generally recommended with not pCR,
however waived (CAR-T history). Recommendation: Completion Trastuzumab q3W + aromatase
inhibitor + Radiatio from 20.09.2023.
19.09.2023 Kiel MRD positive (PB): 5E-5 (0,005%).
12.10.2023 Kiel MRD positive: PB 1E-5 (0,001%); BM 4E-5 (0,004%).
05.12.2023 Kiel MRD positive (PB): 8E-5 (0,008%).
08.01.2024
20.02.2024 D+655: continued hematologic CR; MRD at the detection limit with continued
PCR-detectable CAR-T cells. No treatment indication. Additionally: FACS MRD pos (PB/BM
each ~0,01%); Kiel MRD pos (PB/BM each 1E-4).
19.03.2024 D+683: continued hematologic CR; MRD at the detection limit, CAR-T in PCR
detectable. No treatment indication. Kiel MRD pos (PB): 4E-4 (0,001%).
================================================================================
